description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, minimalist design. The front facade features a row of blue-tinted glass balcony railings on the upper floor, with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors below. The exterior is clad in dark horizontal panels, giving it a contemporary appearance, and the structure is set on a wide, light gray platform that extends outward, possibly serving as a driveway or patio. The rear of the house is more closed off, with fewer windows and a solid central section. The side views reveal the depth of the balconies and the extension of the platform, as well as the consistent use of modern materials throughout. A small potted plant is visible on the upper balcony, adding a touch of greenery to the otherwise geometric and monochrome structure.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, blue glass balconies, and large windows, set on a wide gray platform. The exterior features dark horizontal paneling and a minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing blue glass balcony railings, large windows, and the main entry area beneath the upper floor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the balconies and the extension of the gray platform to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid central section, fewer windows, and a wide platform extending from the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the balcony and the platform extending to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with large glass doors beneath the balcony, no visible steps or porch, minimalist and integrated into the facade.
